title: [ExportVerilog] Unnecessary temporary wires for single use values

features.name: single_use_wire_inlining_in_always_ifdef
features.description: Code should include a wire assignment to an expression that is only used once, within an sv.always block containing an sv.ifdef block

features.name: comparison_in_if_condition_within_always_ifdef
features.description: Code should include a comb.icmp result used in an if condition inside sv.always and sv.ifdef blocks
